home.title: Build your top 9 anime list and share your taste
home.introStart: Search anime, pick exactly nine titles, rank them, and publish your list. It’s a
home.introEnd: where you can browse others’ top 9 and join the conversation in comments.
home.step1: Search and select up to nine anime you love.
home.step2: Reorder them from #1 to #9 (e.g. drag and drop).
home.step3: Add a title and description and publish your post.
home.ruleNote: Each post must include nine different anime—no duplicates.

community.title: Community trends
community.description: Switch tabs to see posts and anime rankings. (Demo data)
community.rankingSubtitle: Titles that show up most often in top 9 lists.
community.rankingEmpty: No anime match these filters. Try another option.
community.commentsEmpty: No comments yet. Be the first to say hi. (Demo)

editor.title: Top 9 editor
editor.intro: Tap + on an empty cell to search the demo catalog and pick a title. When all nine slots are filled, you can share or start writing your post.
editor.allNineHintSaved: Reopen share or post, or edit your saved title and description.
editor.allNineHintNew: Continue to share or write your post.
editor.nineDoneHint: Share your list or write a post. Closing returns you to the board.
editor.searchHint: Search the demo list by title or synopsis keyword, then tap a card to place it in this slot.
editor.minQuery: Type at least two characters to search.
editor.searchEmpty: No results. Try a different keyword.
editor.metaHint: Add a headline and a short intro for your list.
editor.contentPlaceholder: Why this list, what you’d recommend, and so on.
editor.shareHint: Copy the text below or use your device’s share sheet.
editor.toastDuplicate: That title is already in another slot.
editor.toastRefetchFail: Couldn’t load search results. Try again shortly.
editor.toastTitleRequired: Please enter a title (at least one character).
editor.toastShareUnsupported: System share isn’t available here. Use copy instead.
editor.toastShareFail: Share failed. Try copying the text instead.
editor.toastCopyFail: Copy failed. Select the text manually.

postNotFound.title: Post not found
postNotFound.description: It may have been removed or the link might be wrong.
